query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'sales' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%lat%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%long%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Coord%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Lyf6vpHy5kosAX.ad5e7732c0a3 --database KxciJFHZo62ThWBBp8dHpL --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'sales' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%lat%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%long%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Coord%' LIMIT 10;
